name: CFF outline fix + compound glyph fix + fontisan 0.4.41
notes: CFF outline filler (CffOutlineFiller) bridges fontisan's stubbed CFF glyph extraction — all CFF-based OTF donors (Noto Serif Tangut, etc.) now produce real outlines. Compound (composite) glyph fix from fontisan 0.4.41. cp_map identical to v0.3.7 (123,611 codepoints).

name: Compound (composite) glyph fix
notes: Fixes compound (composite) glyphs that had empty or offset contours. Combined with the CFF outline fix from v0.4.0.

name: CFF-based OTF donors (Tangut, etc.) outline fix
notes: First release with CffOutlineFiller — fontisan's UFO converter stubs out CFF glyph extraction, producing empty contours for CFF-based OTF donors. This release bridges OutlineExtractor into the UFO to fill real outlines.

name: Verified — OTC (CFF2) + cache infrastructure (SVG, WOFF2)
notes: Identical coverage to v0.3.4 (cp_map byte-stable: 123,611 codepoints, U+0041→noto-sans, U+13080→uni-hieroglyphica). Canonical OTC with CFF2 outlines. BuildCache infrastructure now wired through the whole release pipeline: per-plane WOFF/WOFF2 encoding keyed by TTF sha256, SVG export keyed by OTC sha256. UFO disk cache scaffolded but disabled pending fontisan Ufo::Reader Phase 2 (contour/component decoding).

name: Broken — SVG refactor NameError (superseded by v0.3.7)
notes: DO NOT USE. Pipeline built the OTC + per-plane TTFs successfully but crashed during SVG export: _emit_svg_exports_from_otc referenced `out_dir` which was not in scope after the cache refactor split it into a separate method. No GitHub Release published, no npm publish.

name: Broken — SVG refactor NameError (superseded by v0.3.6)
notes: DO NOT USE. First attempt at wiring BuildCache around SVG export. _emit_svg_exports_from_otc lost the `font = Fontisan::FontLoader.load(otc_path)` line when split off from the outer wrapper, crashing with NameError. No GitHub Release published, no npm publish.

name: Verified — UFO build + glyph-bounds fix + CpMap fix + OTC + cache infra
notes: Verified correct — cp_map identical to v0.3.2. All three bugs fixed: (1) CpMap restrict_to_covers — FSung no longer claims Latin, (2) UFO normalization — glyphs scaled to 1000-upm, (3) uni-hieroglyphica primary for Egyptian — native 1000-upm. Canonical OTC (CFF2). BuildCache infrastructure (SVG + WOFF2 caching active).

name: Broken — Marshal regression (superseded by v0.3.4)
notes: DO NOT USE. Marshal.dump of fontisan UFO objects raised TypeError, causing all non-CBDT donors to be silently skipped. Only 81 codepoints in output.

name: UFO-driven build + glyph-bounds fix (TTC)
notes: UFO-driven build (same as v0.3.1 but produces TTC/glyf instead of OTC/CFF2).

name: Per-plane WOFF2 + npm package
notes: Ships as essenfont on npm with per-plane WOFF2 + CSS bundles.

name: Initial alpha — donor registry + BMP build
